commands.review_summary:
The PR clears matching OAuth `lastGood` state on `refresh_token_reused`, resolves inherited-profile owner storage, patches requester runtime snapshots, adds helper tests, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run in this review. The linked logs plus current-main source provide a source-level path: a `refresh_token_reused` OAuth failure can be wrapped without clearing the stale `lastGood` pointer.
